title: androsace sarmentosa subsp. primuloides
intro: Androsace sarmentosa subsp. primuloides, also known as a plant species, is a type of flowering plant in the Primulaceae family. This plant is native to high-altitude grasslands and alpine meadows in the Himalayas and Tibet. The medicinal properties of Androsace sarmentosa subsp. primuloides include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
